title: Krishna Vrinda Vihari
subTitle: Krishna, a young man from an orthodox Brahmin family, falls in love with Vrinda, a woman unable to have children. To gain his family's approval, Krishna elaborates a lie to convince them to agree to the marriage.

subTitle: Nanda is a married man who tries to impress Ragini, the MD of their company. However, he realises that his job is not as easy as it looks because she wants to marry him.

title: Godzilla
subTitle: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York city in order to feed and protect its brood.

subTitle: When her daughter, Aishu, goes missing, a mother fails to get any help from the police and decides to investigate the case herself.

subTitle: After an ordinary delivery boy leaves his job due to poor pay, his roommate proposes a scheme to make quick money, only to land in serious danger.

subTitle: After a cheating attempt comes to light, Manoj Kumar Sharma, fails his tests. Years later, determined to become a police officer, Manoj attempts one of the most difficult exams in the country.

title: CID
subTitle: When Sapna reports being stalked by a psychopath, all evidence leads Team CID towards the unknown suspect when Sapna's boyfriend is found dead. The team needs to be vigilant in tracking the killer.

title: CID
subTitle: Women working late at night are being targeted one after the other on the lonely skywalk in Kharghar. Soon, the CID team begins to investigate the matter to bring down the killer.

title: CID
subTitle: The CID discovers human fingers etched with numbers in sausage packets. So, they trace the origin of the packets to a factory where they uncover a much larger diamond smuggling ring.

title: CID
subTitle: After robbing a bank, the criminals hijack a local bus full of passengers and flee away. Team CID must find and stop them before they hurt those passengers.

title: CID
subTitle: The CID team finds the robber's getaway vehicle that was towed. Soon, they manage to track the local bus that was hijacked by the criminals.

title: CID
subTitle: The CID team rush out looking for Dr Salunkhe when he is reported missing. On realising who the suspect is, the team is divided into two groups in order to rescue Salunkhe and arrest the culprit.

subTitle: Pyare and Mohan fall in love with sisters Preeti and Priya, only to face rejection. Later, when the sisters are accused of murder, the two men spring into action to prove their innocence.

subTitle: Akash and Maya, two doctors, are happily married and expecting a baby. However, things take a turn when Maya's bus crashes, and she is believed to be dead.

subTitle: Shankar, an assassin, is on the run after murdering a politician. When a twist of fate gives him the memories of a slain police officer, he must help the authorities find a murderer.

subTitle: Wong, a mischievous young boy, learns a special form of martial arts from his alcoholic master in order to prevent an assassin from executing his goals.

subTitle: A complex relationship unfolds between an uncle and his nephew, testing their family ties through emotional turmoil and personal conflicts.

title: CID
subTitle: A woman gets mysteriously kidnapped during her wedding anniversary celebrations. Soon, the CID team is called to investigate the matter.

title: CID
subTitle: A mysterious message leads Abhijeet to a resort where he arrives in disguise with the intention of saving a girl. But he too is held hostage while Team CID discover a sinister plot to trap Abhijeet.

subTitle: A mysterious poison turns a corporate party into a death affair. Subsequently, the CID team must win the race against time to stop the poison and catch the culprit.

title: CID
subTitle: The CID team manages to capture Raghu, a criminal, who kidnapped a child. Later, Daya and Abhijeet take him to the interrogation room, where he bangs his head to the wall and kills himself.

subTitle: Bittu, a movie fanatic and student, always talks in Bollywood references. However, this drives his teacher crazy as he always tries to make Bittu studious and excel in his academics.

subTitle: An aspiring singer meets a beautiful woman unexpectedly in a police station. Later, he chases after her, and eventually they start dating each other, but they have to deal with many problems thereafter.

subTitle: A ventriloquist falls in love with a wealthy man's daughter. When she is forced to marry according to her family's wishes, the ventriloquist teams up with her uncle to save her.

subTitle: A naive alien comes to Earth where he loses his device. As he spends time on the planet looking for it, he raises many thought-provoking questions that capture the attention of a journalist.

subTitle: A father looking for his daughter in different hotels gets into trouble when he finds a woman hanging to the ceiling fan in one of the hotel rooms. Soon, the CID team is called to investigate.

title: CID
subTitle: Inspector Abhijeet gets a phone call from an unknown woman asking for help. When he turns up at the spot, he finds her dead, and in turn, gets hit on the head.

title: CID
subTitle: CID investigates a dancer's murder, uncovering a series of killings tied to an artistic pattern and a dark past. As they race to stop the next crime, the case leads to a dramatic showdown in an abandoned theatre.

title: CID
subTitle: As CID investigates the case of some missing teenagers, they come across a photograph that features a man who was a suspect in an 80-year-old case. But surprisingly, he has not aged at all.

subTitle: The CID team investigates a few cases wherein the killer has used ice picks to slit the throats of his victims. The team believes that the murderer is inspired by a known psychopath.

title: CID
